growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: fierer.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.medium: Anoxic N/Fe-free Burk's medium + 5 mM Fe(III)-citrate, N2 headspace (monoculture)

up.method: 14% of 5 mM Fe(III) reduced (=0.7 mM) over ~7 days

up.units: active (nitrogenase; numeric value not in main text)

growth_records.cite: Liu, Xiaohan et al. Synergistic interaction between microbial nitrogen fixation and iron reduction in the environment. The ISME Journal (2025). DOI:10.1093/ismejo/wraf212. [PMC12516963]
growth_records.snippet: where S. oneidensis MR-1 and A. humicireducens SgZ-5T achieved only 30% and 14% Fe(III) reduction, respectively
growth_records.notes: A. humicireducens SgZ-5T monoculture control (model diazotroph, weak DIRB). Fe(III) reduction = 0.14 x 5 mM = 0.7 mM over 7 days = 0.10 mM/day (volumetric). Fixes N2 but reduces Fe(III) poorly alone; syntrophy with MR-1 markedly boosts total DIR. No mu/gDW reported.

phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 140653 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/140653
